title: Bitter Chewy Brazilian Chocolate Stir-fry
description: A post-workout dish featuring bitter chocolate and Italian seasoning, perfect for a halal-friendly snack.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add halal honey or agave nectar and let it melt until golden brown, stirring continuously to avoid burning.
Fold in the dark chocolate and Italian seasoning, stirring gently until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes to ensure all ingredients are heated through and the chocolate is melted into a chewy consistency.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
